Trust & Compliance

Certified, Compliant
& Export Ready

Every shipment from Zad Global Trade is backed by the required regulatory certifications and international compliance standards.

Why It Matters

Compliance Is Not Optional —
It Is Our Baseline

International buyers require full regulatory compliance before any shipment can clear customs. At Zad Global Trade, we hold all mandatory Indian export certifications and ensure every shipment is accompanied by the correct per-shipment documentation — so your import process is smooth, fast and fully compliant with your country's regulations.

Our Certifications

Registrations & Licenses

🌾 Active

APEDA Registration

Govt. of India — Ministry of Commerce

Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority registration — mandatory for all fresh produce exporters in India. Required for every export consignment.

📋 Active

IEC — Import Export Code

DGFT — Directorate General of Foreign Trade

The Import Export Code is the primary business identification number for any Indian exporter. Issued by DGFT, it is mandatory for customs clearance of all export shipments.

🛡️ Active

FSSAI License

Food Safety & Standards Authority of India

FSSAI certification confirms that our produce handling, storage and packing facilities meet India's food safety and hygiene standards — a requirement for all food exporters.

📑 Active

GST Registration

Govt. of India — Tax Authority

Goods & Services Tax registration confirming Zad Global Trade as a legally registered business entity in India. Required for all commercial export invoices and documentation.

Per Shipment

Documents Issued for Every Consignment

🌿

Phytosanitary Certificate

Issued by the Plant Quarantine authority of India for every shipment. Confirms that the produce is free from pests, diseases and meets the importing country's plant health regulations.

🔬

Quality & Inspection Certificate

Pre-shipment quality inspection report confirming grade, size, weight and condition of the produce at the time of packing and loading — issued per consignment.

📦

Fumigation Certificate

Where required by the destination country, a fumigation certificate is provided confirming the produce and packaging has been treated to international quarantine standards.

🌍

Certificate of Origin

Officially certifies that the produce originates from India. Required for customs clearance in all destination countries and for availing preferential trade agreements where applicable.

📄

Commercial Invoice & Packing List

Full commercial documentation including itemised invoice, packing list with weights and carton counts — provided in the format required by your country's customs authority.

🚢

Bill of Lading / Airway Bill

Freight transport document issued by the carrier confirming shipment details, port of origin, destination and cargo description — provided for every sea or air freight consignment.

Our Standards

What We Follow on Every Export

Beyond certifications, our operations are governed by strict internal protocols aligned to international fresh produce trade standards. From farm selection to container loading, every step follows a documented process.

This means when your shipment arrives, it meets exactly what was agreed — in quality, quantity and condition.

  • Codex Alimentarius food safety standards for fresh produce
  • IPPC (International Plant Protection Convention) compliance
  • Destination country MRL (Maximum Residue Limits) adherence
  • Cold chain temperature protocols maintained farm to port
  • Traceability from farm harvest to export container
  • Packaging meets ISPM 15 standards for wooden materials

Compliance at a glance

APEDA Registered Exporter ✓ Certified
IEC Code Holder ✓ Certified
FSSAI Licensed ✓ Certified
GST Registered Entity ✓ Certified
Phytosanitary — Per Shipment ✓ Issued
Certificate of Origin ✓ Issued
Cold Chain Compliance ✓ Maintained
MRL Compliant Produce ✓ Verified

Need Specific Documentation?

If you require specific certificates for your import process or due diligence, get in touch and we will provide what you need promptly.
